- complementary "Main navigation":

    - text: Manage

      - /url: https://soundit-dev/alerts

    - link " Billing ":

    - text: Settings
    - link " General":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/settings/general
    - link " Staff":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/settings/staff
    - link " Integrations":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/settings/integrations
    - link " Alerts Hub":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/settings/alerts
    - link " MCP Tokens":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/settings/mcp-tokens
    - text: Recent
    - link " VAN-APP01":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/assets/8
    - link " Vandelay Industries":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/clients/3
    - link " T-173 QA tester live crea...":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/173
    - link " T-174 QA tester live flow...":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/174
    - link " T-1 [ALERT] VAN-APP01 - S...":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/1
    - link " T-172 QA tester manual ti...":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/172
    - link " T-99 QA status flow 20260...":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/99
    - link " Managed Services Agreemen...":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/contracts/4
  - button "Toggle sidebar" [expanded]: 
- banner:
  - text: VAN-APP01
  - button " Search Ctrl+K"
  - button "AM Alex Morgan"
- main:
  - link " Back to Vandelay Industries":
    - /url: https://soundit-dev/clients/3
  - heading "VAN-APP01" [level=4]
  - text: ERP Server Online
  - link " Managed Services Agreement":
    - /url: https://soundit-dev/contracts/4
  - link " Edit":
    - /url: https://soundit-dev/assets/8/edit
  - button ""
  - tablist:
    - tab "Overview"
    - tab "Network"
    - tab "Storage"
    - tab "Software"
    - tab "Patches"
    - tab "Security"
    - tab "Alerts & Tickets" [selected]
    - tab "Backup"
  - tabpanel:
    - text:  Alerts 2 active
    - link "View all":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/alerts?asset_id=8
    - table:
      - rowgroup:
        - row "Source Severity Alert Message Fired Status Actions":
          - columnheader "Source"
          - columnheader "Severity"
          - columnheader "Alert"
          - columnheader "Message"
          - columnheader "Fired"
          - columnheader "Status"
          - columnheader "Actions"
      - rowgroup:
        - 'row " Tactical RMM Critical Server unreachable Agent has not checked in for >10 minutes. Jul 2, 9:59 AM Ticketed #T-1 "':
          - cell " Tactical RMM"
          - cell "Critical"
          - cell "Server unreachable":
            - link "Server unreachable":
              - /url: "#"
          - cell "Agent has not checked in for >10 minutes."
          - cell "Jul 2, 9:59 AM"
          - 'cell "Ticketed #T-1"':
            - text: Ticketed
            - link "#T-1":
              - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/1
          - cell "":
            - button ""
        - 'row " Tactical RMM Warning C: drive low free space Free space dropped below 10% threshold. Jun 29, 11:59 AM Ticketed #T-9 "':
          - cell " Tactical RMM"
          - cell "Warning"
          - 'cell "C: drive low free space"':
            - 'link "C: drive low free space"':
              - /url: "#"
          - cell "Free space dropped below 10% threshold."
          - cell "Jun 29, 11:59 AM"
          - 'cell "Ticketed #T-9"':
            - text: Ticketed
            - link "#T-9":
              - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/9
          - cell "":
            - button ""
    - text:  Recent Tickets
    - link "View all tickets":
      - /url: https://soundit-dev/assets/8/tickets
    - table:
      - rowgroup:
        - row "ID Subject Priority Status Assignee Updated":
          - columnheader "ID"
          - columnheader "Subject"
          - columnheader "Priority"
          - columnheader "Status"
          - columnheader "Assignee"
          - columnheader "Updated"
      - rowgroup:
        - row "T-174 QA tester live flow 20260709 1613 P2 - High In Progress Alex Morgan 58 minutes ago":
          - cell "T-174"
          - cell "QA tester live flow 20260709 1613":
            - link "QA tester live flow 20260709 1613":
              - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/174
          - cell "P2 - High"
          - cell "In Progress"
          - cell "Alex Morgan"
          - cell "58 minutes ago"
        - row "T-1 [ALERT] VAN-APP01 - Server unreachable P1 - Critical In Progress Devon Carter 2 days ago":
          - cell "T-1"
          - cell "[ALERT] VAN-APP01 - Server unreachable":
            - link "[ALERT] VAN-APP01 - Server unreachable":
              - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/1
          - cell "P1 - Critical"
          - cell "In Progress"
          - cell "Devon Carter"
          - cell "2 days ago"
        - 'row "T-9 VAN-APP01 - C: drive low free space P2 - High In Progress Priya Shah 6 days ago"':
          - cell "T-9"
          - 'cell "VAN-APP01 - C: drive low free space"':
            - 'link "VAN-APP01 - C: drive low free space"':
              - /url: https://soundit-dev/tickets/9
          - cell "P2 - High"
          - cell "In Progress"
          - cell "Priya Shah"
          - cell "6 days ago"
- contentinfo: © 2026 Sound IT PSA
